vocab.exampleEn: Some level of stress is inevitable before an important exam.
vocab.exampleZh: 重要考试前有一定压力是不可避免的。
vocab.upgradeEn: Use inevitable when something cannot be completely avoided.
vocab.upgradeZh: 无法完全避免的事情，可以用 inevitable。

cycle.summaryEn: Build clean sentences with the right tense, articles, and clause control.
cycle.summaryZh: 把时态、冠词和从句控制好，句子更稳。

frame.useEn: Use to give a clear opinion.

meaningEn: This writing word helps Becky build stronger IELTS paragraphs and ideas.
meaningZh: 这个写作词可以帮助 Becky 写出更强的雅思段落和观点。
promptEn: China drill: read the Chinese meaning, shadow the example twice, then make one Becky-style sentence with "inevitable" using I strongly believe that...
promptZh: 中文母语者练法：先看中文意思，跟读例句两遍，再用 "inevitable" 和 我强烈认为... 写一句 Becky 自己的话。
sourceEn: This harder word is auto-picked for Becky and refreshes every day with a China-friendly output drill.
sourceZh: 这个高分词会每天自动为 Becky 刷新，并配中文母语者适用的输出练习。
